## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Mindaugas Petrutis, exploring potential fit for an Innovation Strategist role at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is building an AI workflow engine and platform for content creation, with plans to expand into recruiting and other verticals](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Mindaugas has a diverse background in hospitality, recruitment, community building, and AI-powered product development](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [The role discussed is flexible, focusing on solving problems, automating processes, and moving between projects](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3800.0)
  - [growthx.ai's approach combines service work (agency) with product development, using client work to inform R\&D](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3568.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Business Model and Technology

  - [Building an AI workflow engine and platform for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Combining agency work with product development (70 people, 40 in marketplace)](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3917.0)
  - [Creating microapps on top of workflows (e.g., fact checker, image generation)](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3407.0)
  - [Plans to expand into recruiting and other verticals](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3212.0)
  - [Focus on automating processes and incorporating AI into solutions](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3568.0)

### Mindaugas' Background and Experience

  - [10 years in hospitality, developing pressure-handling skills](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [Transitioned to recruitment, specializing in design roles](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Built communities and relationships in the design industry](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Worked at InVision, managing customer success and community](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [Founded a career development platform (spun out from OnDeck)](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=2295.0)
  - [Recent focus on building AI-powered products and solutions](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

### Potential Role at growthx.ai

  - [Innovation Strategist position, similar to recently hired colleague](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3711.0)
  - [Focus on solving problems, automating processes, and moving between projects](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3800.0)
  - [Involvement in strategy sprints for clients, helping define workflows and solutions](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3720.0)
  - [Opportunity to utilize diverse skill set across multiple projects and verticals](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3770.0)

### Current Market Landscape

  - [Discussion of tools like Lovable, Bolt, and other AI-powered solutions](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Challenges in user activation and retention for non-technical users](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)
  - [Opportunity to guide users and improve product experiences](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)

## Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai to send a verbal offer via email today or tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=4615.0)
  - [No need for additional references due to connection through Ren](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=4633.0)
  - [Mindaugas to consider the offer alongside potential offer from Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=4638.0)
  - [Further discussions may be needed to clarify specific role details and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/uDKr5wdav6gx1yVfxJ2KziXJ9gE7yqxo?tab=summary&timestamp=4654.0)
